title: Keralam Forms First-Ever Artificial Intelligence Ministry; PK Kunhalikutty Gets Charge
description: The Keralam government has created a dedicated Artificial Intelligence (AI) portfolio for the first time at the cabinet level as part of a major reshuffle of ministerial responsibilities after the newly formed UDF government.

content:

title: US STOCKS-Wall St rises as chip stocks rally ahead of Nvidia results
description: Wall Street's main indexes closed more ‌than ​1% higher on Wednesday, bouncing back from a three-day selloff with a boost in sentiment from technology and chip stocks, which rose ahead of Nvidia's quarterly results. Investors will look to the latest report from Nvidia , the leading artificial intelligence chipmaker and the world's most ‌highly valued company, for reassurance that the appetite for spending on AI remains strong enough to support lofty valuations across the technology sector.

title: Company cutting 17% of staff
description: Intuit's stock has been hammered this year as investors worry that generative artificial intelligence models could threaten software companies.
content:
Tax and finance software maker Intuit said Wednesday that it's cutting 17% of its full-time workforce, the latest tech company to announce a mass downsizing during the artificial intelligence boom. Shares tumbled 11% in extended trading.

title: Nvidia Q1 results surpass Wall Street expectations thanks to massive AI chip demand
description: Artificial intelligence chipmaker Nvidia's quarterly results surpassed Wall Street's expectations once again, fueled by massive demand for its high-end AI chips. The company said Wednesday it earned $58.32 billion, or $2.39 per share, in the February-April period, up from $18.78 billion, or 76 cents per share, in the same period…

title: Networks as the intelligent fabric of an AI-driven world
description: Writing for World Telecom Day, Ericsson India MD Nitin Bansal outlines why the true potential of artificial intelligence hinges on intelligent, high-performing 5G standalone networks.

title: CCI to onboard analysts and data scientists
description: The Competition Commission of India is enhancing its capabilities to understand digital markets and artificial intelligence. The regulator is hiring data scientists and analysts with expertise in AI tools and digital market operations. This move aims to strengthen the CCI's oversight. The CCI is also increasing approvals for non-problematic transactions through an automated route.

title: Shadow Treasurer Tim Wilson says AI will reshape public service
description: Shadow Treasurer Tim Wilson says artificial intelligence can drive public spending efficiencies, while declining to say how big the APS should be
content:
Shadow Treasurer Tim Wilson has foreshadowed a plan to leverage artificial intelligence to slash public spending, while refusing to say how many public service jobs a Coalition government would cut.

title: Democrats mount new attempt to end Medicare AI prior authorization pilot
description: Democrats in Senate and House are mounting a fresh effort to end a Medicare pilot to use artificial intelligence to approve or deny care.
